metadata.title:
Union Men Claim There Is a Gigantic Scheme
Afoot to Disrupt Organized Labor


in Spokane.

pages.raw_text:
The Building Trades council has
thrown down the gauntlet to the Mas
ter Builders association and has hurl-
ed defiance in their teeth. 1t is now up
to the association to commence to do
it's worst in its alleged efforts to dis
rupt the council and the unions of the
city in general.


The union people claim they now
have all the evidence needed to con-
vince them that a gigantic scheme has
been underway looking toward their
entire disruption, and that behind the
scheme is not only the master builders
themselves, but by all the allied en-
ployers of the city. For some time
local unionists have been sorely puz-
zled to gain a clear conception of tue
